response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber, 音乃瀬奏 (Otonose Kanade), performing two Japanese vocal songs live, "敗北の少年" and "Luna say maybe". The video includes introductory talk and a transition between the two songs.

scenes.description: The performer, 音乃瀬奏, appears and interacts with the audience, introducing the first song.
The performer sings "敗北の少年". Text on screen identifies the song and the composer as kemu.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぶつかって 逃げ込んで
僕はずっとここに立ってた
誰もが憧れる ヒーローに
なりたくて でもなれなくて
これぐらいじゃ 届かないこと
分かっていたのに
敗北の少年 現実を謳え
[... Full lyrics ...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Bumped into, escaped, and ran in
Before I knew it, I was standing here
I wanted to be a hero that everyone admires
But I couldn't, even though I knew
That just being like this wouldn't get me there
Defeated boy, sing of reality
[... Full lyrics ...]

scenes.description: A brief transition scene with light effects between the two songs.
The performer sings "Luna say maybe". Text on screen identifies the composer/lyricist as 美波 (Minami).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あのね。 I say “私、大丈夫?”
Maybe, うまくやれるはず
ずっと走った息継ぎもしないまま
あっそう、終わりが来るなら
別に寂しくなんかはない
真実は心の奥の方
自分のことすら愛せないまま
君のこと守れるのかな
“信じて”
[... Full lyrics ...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I say 'Am I okay?'
Maybe, I should be able to do it well
Running all the way without even taking a breath
Oh, if the end is coming
It's not like I'm lonely or anything
Truth is deep in my heart
While not being able to love myself
Can I protect you?
'Believe in me'
[... Full lyrics ...]
